app.name: Rollcall
app.one_sentence_promise: A shooting log and on-device light meter for film photographers, so every roll comes back matched to the settings you actually used.
app.target_user: Film photography hobbyists shooting manual cameras with no metadata, who struggle to remember settings per frame.
app.painful_moment: Getting a developed roll back weeks later with no idea what aperture/shutter/ISO combo was used on which frame, losing the chance to learn from it.
app.why_different: Combines a fast per-frame logging flow with an on-device camera-based incident light meter using Vision/Core Image luminance analysis — a distinct hobbyist workflow, not a general measurement or object-history tool.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited rolls/cameras tracked, advanced spot/incident metering presets per film stock, scan-matching to attach developed negatives later, shooting analytics.
app.subscription_model: Free: 2 active rolls, basic light meter. Paid: unlimited rolls, advanced metering, scan matching, analytics.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Entirely on-device roll/frame log and camera-based light meter computation.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Optional cloud backup/sync across devices; potential future community film-stock preset database.
core_workflows: Start a roll (camera, lens, film stock)
Log a frame with meter-assisted settings and a note
Attach scanned negatives to matched frames later
ios_native_features: Camera/Vision framework for on-device light metering
App Intents/Siri for quick frame logging
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device Vision/Core Image luminance analysis for the light meter — the clean, non-forced ML fit for this batch.
app.design_direction: Tactile, analog-inspired premium design — film-stock color swatches, dial/gauge-style meter UI, feels like a well-made physical accessory.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a tactile, analog-camera-inspired app: a dial-style on-device light-meter screen, a fast per-frame logging form, and a film-stock-swatched roll history view.
app.app_store_positioning: The shooting log made for film — meter your light, log your frame, never lose a setting again.
key_risks: Niche audience caps broad virality; growth must lean on niche-community channels
On-device light-meter accuracy must be credible to a technically knowledgeable audience
app.invalidation_criteria: If the light-meter feature is rarely used and manual logging alone doesn't retain users, refocus purely on fast logging plus scan-matching.
app.v1_build_scope: Roll/frame logging flow, on-device light meter, roll history browsing.
